predicates.name: has_belgian_nationality_proof
predicates.description: The person provides proof that they possess Belgian nationality.

predicates.name: is_alien
predicates.description: The person is an alien because they do not provide proof of Belgian nationality.

predicates.name: is_union_citizen
predicates.description: The person is a Union citizen.

predicates.name: enjoys_community_free_movement_right
predicates.description: The person enjoys the Community right of free movement as defined in Article 2(5) of the Schengen Borders Code.

predicates.name: is_third_country_national
predicates.description: The person is a third-country national: not a Union citizen and not enjoying the Community right of free movement.

predicates.name: is_present_on_territory
predicates.description: The alien is present on the territory.

predicates.name: meets_entry_or_residence_conditions
predicates.description: The alien meets the conditions for entry to or residence on the territory.

predicates.name: previously_met_entry_or_residence_conditions
predicates.description: The alien previously met the conditions for entry to or residence on the territory but no longer does.

predicates.name: has_illegal_residence
predicates.description: The alien has illegal residence on the territory.

predicates.name: has_valid_travel_document
predicates.description: The alien is in possession of a valid travel document.

predicates.name: has_valid_passport
predicates.description: The alien is in possession of a valid passport.

predicates.name: has_valid_identity_document
predicates.description: The alien is in possession of a valid identity document.

predicates.name: recognised_by_national_authority_with_laissez_passer_willingness
predicates.description: The alien has been recognised as a national by the national authority of their country and that authority has declared willingness to issue a laissez-passer.

predicates.name: falls_within_minister_laissez_passer_nationality_category
predicates.description: The alien falls within the category of nationalities for which the minister may personally issue a laissez-passer.

predicates.name: is_identified_alien
predicates.description: The alien is an identified alien based on possession of valid identity/travel documents or recognition by national authority.

predicates.name: subject_to_removal_procedure
predicates.description: The alien is the subject of a removal procedure.

predicates.name: subject_to_international_protection_procedure
predicates.description: The alien is the subject of a procedure for the granting of international protection.

predicates.name: subject_to_responsible_member_state_determination_procedure
predicates.description: The alien is the subject of a procedure for determining or transferring to the Member State responsible for examining the application for international protection.

predicates.name: reasons_to_believe_will_abscond
predicates.description: There are reasons to believe that the alien will abscond.

predicates.name: absconding_risk_is_current_and_real
predicates.description: The risk of absconding is current and real.

predicates.name: absconding_risk_established_by_individual_examination
predicates.description: The risk of absconding is established following an individual examination.

predicates.name: at_least_one_objective_absconding_criterion_met
predicates.description: At least one of the objective absconding criteria listed in paragraph 2 is met for the person.

predicates.name: subject_to_relevant_procedure
predicates.description: The alien is subject to a removal procedure, international protection procedure, or responsible Member State determination procedure.

predicates.name: risk_of_absconding
predicates.description: A risk of absconding exists for the alien as determined by the legal conditions.

predicates.name: entered_territory_illegally_without_residence_application
predicates.description: The person entered the territory illegally and did not submit a residence application following that illegal entry.

predicates.name: in_illegal_residence_without_residence_application
predicates.description: The person is in illegal residence and did not submit a residence application during that illegal residence.

predicates.name: failed_to_submit_international_protection_application_in_time
predicates.description: The person did not make their application for international protection within the time limit provided for by the Act.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_1_met
predicates.description: The absconding criterion under paragraph 2(1) is met for the person.

predicates.name: used_false_or_misleading_information_in_procedure
predicates.description: The person used false or misleading information in the context of a relevant procedure.

predicates.name: used_false_or_falsified_documents_in_procedure
predicates.description: The person used false or falsified documents in the context of a relevant procedure.

predicates.name: committed_fraud_in_procedure
predicates.description: The person committed fraud in the context of a relevant procedure.

predicates.name: used_other_unlawful_means_in_procedure
predicates.description: The person used other unlawful means in the context of a relevant procedure.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_2_met
predicates.description: The absconding criterion under paragraph 2(2) is met for the person.

predicates.name: failed_to_cooperate_with_authorities
predicates.description: The person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with the authorities responsible for implementation or supervision of alien regulations.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_3_met
predicates.description: The absconding criterion under paragraph 2(3) is met for the person.

predicates.name: declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_transfer_refusal_removal
predicates.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with a transfer, refusal of entry, or removal measure.

predicates.name: failed_to_comply_with_transfer_refusal_removal
predicates.description: The person has already failed to comply with a transfer, refusal of entry, or removal measure.

predicates.name: declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_active_entry_ban
predicates.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with an entry ban that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

predicates.name: failed_to_comply_with_active_entry_ban
predicates.description: The person has already failed to comply with an entry ban that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

predicates.name: declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_less_coercive_measure
predicates.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with a less coercive measure than deprivation of liberty aimed at guaranteeing transfer, refusal of entry, or removal.

predicates.name: failed_to_comply_with_less_coercive_measure
predicates.description: The person has already failed to comply with a less coercive measure than deprivation of liberty aimed at guaranteeing transfer, refusal of entry, or removal.

predicates.name: declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_liberty_restricting_measure_public_order
predicates.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with a liberty-restricting measure aimed at guaranteeing public order or national security.

predicates.name: failed_to_comply_with_liberty_restricting_measure_public_order
predicates.description: The person has already failed to comply with a liberty-restricting measure aimed at guaranteeing public order or national security.

predicates.name: declared_unwillingness_to_comply_with_equivalent_member_state_measure
predicates.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with a measure taken by another Member State equivalent to a transfer, refusal of entry, removal, entry ban, less coercive measure, or liberty-restricting measure.

predicates.name: failed_to_comply_with_equivalent_member_state_measure
predicates.description: The person has already failed to comply with a measure taken by another Member State equivalent to a transfer, refusal of entry, removal, entry ban, less coercive measure, or liberty-restricting measure.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_4_met
predicates.description: The absconding criterion under paragraph 2(4) is met for the person.

predicates.name: subject_to_active_entry_ban_in_kingdom
predicates.description: The person is the subject of an entry ban in the Kingdom that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

predicates.name: subject_to_active_entry_ban_in_other_member_state
predicates.description: The person is the subject of an entry ban in another Member State that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_5_met
predicates.description: The absconding criterion under paragraph 2(5) is met for the person.

predicates.name: submitted_new_application_after_refusal_or_termination_decision
predicates.description: The person was subject to a decision refusing entry or residence or terminating residence and immediately after submitted a new residence or international protection application.

predicates.name: submitted_new_application_after_refusal_or_removal_measure
predicates.description: The person was subject to a refusal of entry or removal measure and immediately after submitted a new residence or international protection application.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_6_met
predicates.description: The absconding criterion under paragraph 2(6) is met for the person.

predicates.name: concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_other_state
predicates.description: The person was questioned about whether they had previously provided fingerprints in another bound State after submitting an international protection application and concealed that fact.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_7_met
predicates.description: The absconding criterion under paragraph 2(7) is met for the person.

predicates.name: submitted_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcome
predicates.description: The person has submitted multiple applications for international protection or residence in the Kingdom or other Member States and those applications resulted in negative decisions or no residence permit.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_8_met
predicates.description: The absconding criterion under paragraph 2(8) is met for the person.

predicates.name: concealed_prior_international_protection_application_in_other_state
predicates.description: The person was questioned about whether they had previously submitted an international protection application in another bound State and concealed that fact.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_9_met
predicates.description: The absconding criterion under paragraph 2(9) is met for the person.

predicates.name: declared_purpose_differs_from_application_purpose
predicates.description: The person declared they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted an international protection or residence application.

predicates.name: file_shows_purpose_differs_from_application_purpose
predicates.description: It appears from the person's file that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted an international protection or residence application.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_10_met
predicates.description: The absconding criterion under paragraph 2(10) is met for the person.

predicates.name: subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal
predicates.description: The person is the subject of a fine because they submitted a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

predicates.name: absconding_criterion_11_met
predicates.description: The absconding criterion under paragraph 2(11) is met for the person.
